name: Tapas Creator Program
reason: Serial fiction/webcomics platform that pays writers via ad revenue share (70%), reader tips in Ink (60-85%), and premium content unlocks (50/50 split). Active Creator Bonus Program pays based on monthly views.
payoutModel: Ad revenue share (70%), reader tips/Ink, premium chapter unlocks (50% split), Creator Bonus Program for high-traffic creators

name: GoodNovel Writer Contract
reason: Serial fiction platform focused on romance, fantasy, and urban fiction. Offers exclusive and non-exclusive contracts, paying writers 50% of reader paid-chapter unlock revenue plus signing bonuses ($50-$100) and completion bonuses (up to $800+).
payoutModel: 50% revenue share from paid chapter unlocks + signing bonuses + completion bonuses + monthly attendance bonuses

name: Webnovel Author Contract
reason: Major web fiction platform for fantasy, romance, and sci-fi. Offers paid author contracts with Minimum Guarantee System ($200/month for new authors), 50% revenue share on premium chapter unlocks, and milestone bonuses. Large English-language readership.
payoutModel: Minimum Guarantee System ($200/month base for new authors) + 50% revenue share on chapter unlocks + milestone bonuses

name: Ream Stories Author Subscriptions
reason: Author-first serial fiction subscription platform. Writers keep ~90% of subscription revenue (after 10% platform fee + payment processing). Authors set their own subscription tiers, offer early chapter access, and keep full creative control. Purpose-built Patreon alternative for fiction writers.
payoutModel: Reader subscriptions — authors keep ~90% of recurring monthly subscriber revenue

name: Vocal Media Creator Program
reason: Writing platform that pays creators per read, through writing challenges/competitions, and reader tips. Vocal+ subscribers get higher payout rates. Free platform open to any writer with no follower minimums to start.
payoutModel: Per-read earnings ($3.80-$6.00 per 1,000 reads for Vocal+), writing challenge prizes, reader tips

name: Domestika Instructor Program
reason: Creative skills online course platform with 11M+ students. Instructors earn an advance fee after production plus ongoing royalties from enrollments. Domestika covers production costs and handles marketing globally. Apply at domestika.org/en/teachers.
payoutModel: Upfront advance fee upon course completion + ongoing royalties from course sales

name: Outschool Teacher Program
reason: Live online classes platform for kids ages 3-18. Teachers set their own class prices and schedule, keeping 70% of enrollment revenue. Outschool takes a 30% fee. Average earnings ~$50/hour, with experienced teachers earning $100+/hour.
payoutModel: 70% of per-student enrollment fee; teachers set their own class prices and schedule

name: Wyzant Tutor Program
reason: One-on-one tutoring marketplace across all subjects. Tutors set their own hourly rates and keep 75% (Wyzant takes 25% fee). Average tutor earns $26-$48/hour after commission; specialized tutors can charge $120-$150+/hour.
payoutModel: 75% of self-set hourly rate per session; Wyzant takes 25% commission

name: Preply Tutor Program
reason: Language and skills tutoring marketplace with millions of students. Tutors set their own rates ($3-$90/hour); Preply takes tiered commission (18-33%) depending on hours taught. After 400+ hours, tutors keep 82% of each lesson. Platform handles student acquisition.
payoutModel: Tutors keep 67-82% of self-set hourly rate (tiered commission 18-33% decreasing as hours increase)

name: Pluralsight Author Program
reason: Tech skills platform for enterprise learners. Expert tech practitioners earn royalties based on proportion of total platform viewing time their courses generate. Some authors receive upfront fees of $1,000-$10,000 plus royalties. Less than 10% of applicants are accepted — high-bar quality.
payoutModel: Royalties based on % of monthly platform viewing time + optional upfront course creation fee ($1,000-$10,000)
